title: RMS International Craft Hub Marble Bear Series 1 Marble Pouring Keyring Kit Design/Paint Your Own Bear Childrens Kids Art & Craft 8+ Years (Multi-Coloured)
features: UNIQUE ARTISTIC EXPERIENCE: Transform plain bear keyrings into works of art with mesmerising marble patterns in the Keyring Edition.
COMPLETE KIT: Everything you need is in the box – 2 x 8cm bear keyrings, 5 x 30ml paints, 1 paint brush, 2 paper cups, 2 paper plates, 1 spoon, double-sided tape, and instructions.
ENDLESS CREATIVITY: Experiment with different pouring techniques to create your own one-of-a-kind designs that reflect your style.
PERFECT FOR ALL SKILL LEVELS: Whether you're a seasoned artist or just starting, our step-by-step instructions make it easy to achieve stunning results.
DURABLE MATERIALS: Crafted from high-quality plastic, your marble bear keyring creations will be lasting pieces of art to cherish.
GREAT FOR GIFTS: Surprise a crafty friend or family member with this unique pouring kit – it's an ideal present for birthdays, holidays, or any special occasion.
CHERISH MEMORIES: Gift the beautifully crafted keyrings to friends and family, or keep them as cherished mementos of your artistic journey.
RELAXING AND THERAPEUTIC: Experience the soothing and meditative benefits of pouring art, perfect for stress relief and mindfulness.
VERSATILE CRAFT: Not limited to the bear keyrings, use the pouring techniques on other items like canvases, pottery, and more.
description: Unleash your inner artist with the Marble Bear Keyring Edition. This all-in-one pouring kit is perfect for both beginners and experienced crafters who want to create mesmerising marble patterns on adorable 8cm bear keyrings. With everything you need included, you can start pouring, dripping, and designing right out of the box.
